calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by Giselle Casey, CSR#8098. (514)

Melanie Popper, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Amin J. Cooley and Theresa Samsotha Cooley.
Default of Defendant(s) has been[ duly entered.
Witness William Cooper sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,498.91
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1829.90
Attorney's Fees: $2825.00
Costs: $1004.57
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,158.38
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Continued To Aug-14-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
